calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To May-05-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:18:06 p.m. and concluding at 02:22:05 p.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. represented by Eric Jun, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Art of Moving LLC not appearing.

Declaration of Nancy Bermudez filed Jan-27-2023 and Supplemental Declaration of Nancy Bermudez filed Apr-25-2023 reviewed by the Court. NANCY BERMUDEZ is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and is examined by the Court.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Worker's Compensation Insurance Billing Invoice - January 2023

The matter is submitted.
The Court is satisified that the Plaintiff has carried their bourdon to prove their damages.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Art of Moving, LLC, as follows:

1. Damages: $14,413.21
2. Costs: $689.42
3. Prejudgment Interest: $1,469.01
4. Attorney Fees: $1,200.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $17,771.64
Proposed judgment signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
